public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as renewal processional director.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a renewal processional director still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of renewal processional director in and around Renewal Plaza of Masks, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Renewal Plaza of Masks workable through the obligations of renewal processional director while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Renewal Plaza of Masks, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of renewal processional director visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Banner-Master Liora Embermask can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Banner-Master Liora Embermask needs help with a problem in Renewal Plaza of Masks that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Banner-Master Liora Embermask carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Renewal Plaza of Masks: the part of Renewal Plaza of Masks where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
